notes: Warzone → season lookup table. LWS has ~2400+ active warzones total (numbered sequentially from #1, one new every 2-3 days, highest observed #2847 as of 2026-07-19). Each warzone belongs to a 'Transfer Warzone Group' of 64 adjacent numbers — you can only see/transfer within your group. Confirmed groups documented so far: 485-548, 901-932, 1029-1060, 1981-2044 (owner's group). Season state is NOT published anywhere per-warzone — we crowdsource via /api/warzone/contribute. Full 2400-row DB comes from scraping cpt-hedge.com + lastwarhub.com nightly (planned v1.1). NO FABRICATED season data.

3.notes: Oldest still-live server per Cpt-Hedge snapshot Season state unconfirmed — please contribute if you play here.

kr-mixed.notes: Korean-market warzones tend to launch S2 ~2 weeks ahead of NA/EU (community heuristic, unverified)

na-mixed.notes: NA warzones on standard First Fun release cadence

eu-mixed.notes: EU warzones typically 1-3 days after NA

latam-mixed.notes: LATAM warzones follow their own late-merge cycle

cn-mixed.notes: Chinese-market warzones (逆战:世界大战) may have region-locked events
